name: Italian Rum Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Dark pitted cherries, drained and soaked in rum overnight
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not use instant pudding.
2. Drain the rum from the cherries and add it to the Creme de cacao mixture.
3. Cook both puddings separately. Let them cool.
4. Line the bottom of a springform pan with cookies.
5. Fill in all gaps with cookies.
6. Drizzle the rum and Creme de cacao mixture over the cookies, using 1/3 of the mixture.
7. Add peaches to the vanilla pudding.
8. Add cherries to the chocolate pudding.
9. Place the vanilla pudding with peaches on top of the cookies in the springform pan.
10. Add another layer of cookies.
11. Drizzle with half of the remaining rum mixture.
12. Spread the chocolate pudding with cherries on top.
13. Layer again with cookies and drizzle the remaining rum mixture.
14. Place the cake in the refrigerator for several hours or overnight before serving.
15. Top with whipped cream at serving time.
